seoTitle: Bungarby vs Bungarribee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bungarby and Bungarribee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bungarby and Bungarribee.
heading: Bungarby vs Bungarribee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bungarby, New South Wales and Bungarribee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bungarby and Bungarribee have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Bungarby or Bungarribee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bungarby has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Bungarribee scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bungarby scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Bungarribee scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bungarby or Bungarribee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bungarby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
